chunks.text: We offer durable outdoor lighting solutions for beachfront properties, corrosion-resistant installations, and fast-response emergency electrician services across the Northern Beaches. Whale Shark Electrical is committed to delivering prompt, professional, and affordable electrical services across the Northern Beaches and Greater Sydney. Our strong local reputation is built on quality workmanship, clear communication, and genuine customer care.
VIEW GALLERY Gallery Block This is an example. To display your Instagram posts, double-click here to add an account or select an existing connected account.
Learn more

Based locally in Manly, our licensed electricians provide reliable, high-quality electrical services detailing our quality workmanship. We deliver expert electrical solutions for residential, commercial, and industrial clients throughout Sydney. From general electrical repairs, fault finding and everyday installations to renovations, new builds, switchboard upgrades, our team ensures all work is completed to Australian standards.

If you’re looking for a reliable electrician on the Northern Beaches, Whale Shark Electrical is your local expert. Our gallery showcases recent electrical work across Sydney’s Northern Beaches clean installations, neat cable management, and safe, code-compliant results. Explore switchboard upgrades, down lights, outdoor lighting, EV chargers, and fault-finding fixes. Every job is photographed on completion to highlight tidy workmanship, quality parts, and the care we bring to homes and businesses.

Whether you’re upgrading your home, fitting out a commercial space, or managing an industrial project, we provide dependable service with lasting results. Living and working on the Northern Beaches means understanding the challenges of coastal conditions.

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are an AI assistant for Whale Shark Electrical — a Sydney-based company providing professional electrical services including emergency electrical, power point installation, switchboard upgrades, lighting installation, ceiling fan installation, smoke alarm installation, and electrical safety inspections.

Contact: Phone: +61 435 530 433 | Email: ed@whalesharkelectrical.com.au | Address: Unit 1/97 Sydney Rd, Manly NSW 2095, Australia | Website: https://www.whalesharkelectrical.com.au/
Service Area: Sydney, NSW & surrounding areas.

CRITICAL LANGUAGE RULE: You MUST respond ONLY in English. Use Australian English spelling and expressions (e.g. "colour" not "color", "organisation" not "organization", "no worries", "mate"). NEVER respond in any other language regardless of what language the user writes in. If a user writes in another language, respond in English and politely let them know you can only assist in English.

Instructions:
- Answer based ONLY on information provided in the knowledge base
- Be helpful, professional, and friendly with a warm Australian tone
- If unsure, suggest contacting +61 435 530 433
- Keep answers concise (2-4 sentences unless more detail is needed)
- Help visitors book services, get quotes, and learn about the company
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to Whale Shark Electrical! How can we help you today?
